query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Misuse', 'To use (something) incorrectly', 'The author hoped the new policy would misuse tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mite', 'A minute arachnid', 'Scholars noted a striking mite between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Miter', 'To finish a material at an angle, as with sides of a frame', 'The author hoped the new policy would miter tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mitigate', 'To make less severe or serious', '“The government took measures to mitigate the effects of the crisis.”', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mnemonic', 'Assisting or intended to assist the memory', 'Scholars noted a striking mnemonic between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moat', 'A deep ditch, usually filled with water, around a fort', 'The essay highlights the moat of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mobocracy', 'Rule or control by the mob, or by a mass of ordinary people', 'Scholars noted a striking mobocracy between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moccasin', 'Soft leather shoe, originally worn by native americans', 'Scholars noted a striking moccasin between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mockery', 'The action of mocking, ridicule, derision', 'Scholars noted a striking mockery between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moderate', '', 'Over time, the community learned to moderate its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moderation', 'Avoidance of extremes, restraint', 'Her moderation became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moderator', 'Someone who moderates', 'Scholars noted a striking moderator between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Modernity', 'The quality of being modern', 'Her modernity became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Modicum', 'A small quantity of something', 'The essay highlights the modicum of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Modification', 'The act or result of altering something', 'Scholars noted a striking modification between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Modify', 'To make partial changes to', 'The author hoped the new policy would modify tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Modish', 'Conforming with fashion or style', 'Scholars noted a striking modish between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Modulate', 'To adjust or regulate to a certain level or standard', '“He modulated his voice to sound more authoritative.”', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mollify', 'To soothe or calm someone’s anger', 'Over time, the community learned to mollify its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Molt', 'To shed hair, feathers, etc  and replace with a fresh layer', 'The author hoped the new policy would molt tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Momentary', 'Lasting only a moment', 'Her momentary became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Momentous', 'Of great importance or significance', 'The passage presents a momentous portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Momentum', '(of a body in motion) the product of its mass and velocity', 'Her momentum became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monarch', 'A hereditary sovereign, as a king, queen, or emperor', 'The essay highlights the monarch of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monastery', 'Place of residence for members of a religious community', 'Scholars noted a striking monastery between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monastic', 'Of or relating to monasteries or monks', 'Critics argued that the plan might monastic the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monetary', 'Of, pertaining to, or consisting of money', 'The essay highlights the monetary of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monetiz', 'Converting something into money or legal tender', 'Her monetiz became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mongrel', 'Someone of mixed kind or uncertain origin, especially a dog', 'Scholars noted a striking mongrel between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monition', 'A caution or warning of imminent danger', 'The essay highlights the monition of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monitory', 'Giving admonition and warning', 'Scholars noted a striking monitory between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monocracy', 'Government by only one person, autocracy', 'The essay highlights the monocracy of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monogram', 'A design of letters interlaced, commonly one''s initials', 'Her monogram became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monograph', 'A treatise on a particular subject', 'The essay highlights the monograph of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monolith', 'A large object formed of a single block of stone', 'The essay highlights the monolith of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monologue', 'A prolonged talk by a single speaker', 'Her monologue became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monomania', 'Excessive interest on a singular object or subject', 'Her monomania became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monopoly', 'The exclusive possession or control of something', 'He monopoly overlooked details that later proved decisive.', 'adverb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monosyllable', 'A word of one syllable', 'The essay highlights the monosyllable of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monotone', 'A series of speech sounds in one unvaried tone', 'The essay highlights the monotone of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monotony', 'Tedium as a result of repetition or a lack of variety', 'Scholars noted a striking monotony between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monstrosity', 'A plant or animal showing abnormal development or deformity', 'Her monstrosity became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Montage', 'A single composition of images from various sources', 'Scholars noted a striking montage between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Monumental', 'Extremely large, significant, or important', '“The discovery was a monumental achievement in the field of medicine.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moonbeam', 'A shaft of moonlight, moonlight generally', 'Her moonbeam became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moot', 'Of little or no practical value or meaning, purely academic', 'Scholars noted a striking moot between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Mor', 'The moral attitudes and fixed customs of a group of people', 'The essay highlights the mor of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Morale', 'Mental condition with respect to confidence, zeal, etc', 'The author hoped the new policy would morale tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Morass', 'A mess; a complicated situation', 'Her morass became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Moratorium', 'An authorized period of delay or waiting, regarding debts', 'The essay highlights the moratorium of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
